mapper.sql: alevel_pdf_page_id, alevel_source_file_id, alevel_paper_id, page_no, page_label, page_width_pt, page_height_pt, rotation, text_content, text_normalized, render_asset_id, render_storage_path, render_asset_url, thumbnail_asset_url, image_width_px, image_height_px, render_dpi, content_hash, extraction_json, render_status, error_message, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_pdf_page WHERE alevel_pdf_page_id = #{pdfPageId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_pdf_page WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} AND page_no = #{pageNo} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_pdf_page WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY page_no ASC, alevel_pdf_page_id ASC
SELECT FROM alevel_pdf_page WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY alevel_source_file_id ASC, page_no ASC, alevel_pdf_page_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alevel_pdf_page ( alevel_source_file_id, alevel_paper_id, page_no, page_label, page_width_pt, page_height_pt, rotation, text_content, text_normalized, render_asset_id, render_storage_path, render_asset_url, thumbnail_asset_url, image_width_px, image_height_px, render_dpi, content_hash, extraction_json, render_status, error_message, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{alevelSourceFileId}, #{alevelPaperId}, #{pageNo}, #{pageLabel}, #{pageWidthPt}, #{pageHeightPt}, #{rotation}, #{textContent}, #{textNormalized}, #{renderAssetId}, #{renderStoragePath}, #{renderAssetUrl}, #{thumbnailAssetUrl}, #{imageWidthPx}, #{imageHeightPx}, #{renderDpi}, #{contentHash}, #{extractionJson}, #{renderStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_pdf_page SET alevel_source_file_id = #{alevelSourceFileId}, alevel_paper_id = #{alevelPaperId}, page_no = #{pageNo}, page_label = #{pageLabel}, page_width_pt = #{pageWidthPt}, page_height_pt = #{pageHeightPt}, rotation = #{rotation}, text_content = #{textContent}, text_normalized = #{textNormalized}, render_asset_id = #{renderAssetId}, render_storage_path = #{renderStoragePath}, render_asset_url = #{renderAssetUrl}, thumbnail_asset_url = #{thumbnailAssetUrl}, image_width_px = #{imageWidthPx}, image_height_px = #{imageHeightPx}, render_dpi = #{renderDpi}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, extraction_json = #{extractionJson}, render_status = #{renderStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_pdf_page_id = #{alevelPdfPageId}
UPDATE alevel_pdf_page SET alevel_paper_id = #{paperId}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE alevel_source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1'
